task_description: Create a complete Ashta Chamma (Chowka Bhara) mobile game in Flutter with 5x5 board, 2-player support (HvH pass-and-play + HvAI), cowrie shell and regular dice modes, traditional Indian art style UI using CustomPainter, and simple heuristic AI opponent.

verification.summary: All 152 tests pass. flutter analyze reports no issues. Code review v2 verdict: APPROVED. All critical issues from v1 review were addressed (AI recursion cap, dispose safety, copyWith null clearing, entry pawn visibility). 3 remaining non-blocking UX polish concerns documented.
